micro_rules: Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.
Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.
Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.

rows.command_eng: Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.
rows.output: {"name":"Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#Television).television_channel == 7) { (#Television).television_setchannel(7); } else { (#Television).television_setchannel(11); delay(3600000); }"}
